title: Pilot v2: improve portfolio insight card clarity with benchmark-backed labels
problem: Insight card labels are ambiguous for first-time users, causing misinterpretation of trend signals and confidence score meaning.
evidence: benchmark signal: competing tools label confidence dimension explicitly
proposed_change: Add explicit context labels and short explanatory subtitle in portfolio insight card; scope limited to one user-facing component.
expected_benefit: Reduce interpretation friction, improve trust in insight card, and lower clarification interactions in user testing.
rollback_plan: Revert insight card label changes and restore previous text.
